top_signals.title: Rubio Invites India’s Modi to Visit White House as Ties Improve
top_signals.summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio met Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi in New Delhi on Saturday and invited him to visit the White House, as the two sides work to improve ties. Bloomberg News State Department Reporter Eric Martin joined Christina Ruffini and David Gura on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss Rubio's four-day visit to the world’s most-populous nation for talks with senior Indian officials on issues ranging from energy to regional security. (Source: Bloomberg)
